titles.text: Super Mario World: A Super Mario Adventure

descriptions.text:
A 50 exit hack made by KaidenThelens in like 2 months.

Standard, Not to hard. If you can beat Super Mario World you can probably beat this.
Story: OH NO! Bowser didn't just take Princess Toadstool! He took all the capes too, go and stop him to bring peace to the mushroom land.
